content.eyebrow: Click reveal · from Pillars (or Engagement step 2)
content.title: Strategy

notes: Reached from TWO entrypoints — the Strategy capsule on slide 2 and the Strategy step on slide 3. parentSlide: 2 picks the capsule path as the canonical 'back' target; the controller back-arrow returns there regardless of which entry was used. The /3 step still passes through correctly because click-reveal navigation is global.
